body_txt: A captured or otherwise helpless victim is stripped of their clothing as a form of torture or humiliation. This can be the prelude to serious sexual assault, but the point of the exercise is to torment the captive by leaving them bare and exposed to the eyes of their captors — frequently Come to Gawk is involved. It's especially cruel if the captive is forced to self -strip, symbolizing their complete subjugation. The temperature will often be quite cold as well, causing the captive to shiver. A strip search by the police or other security forces may fall under this trope, particularly if Corrupt Cops are involved or if the captive is known or suspected to be innocent by the audience. The captive's reaction depends to some extent upon whether it's a woman or a man being stripped. A woman may blush and cringe , and the I Have You Now, My Pretty subtext will be quite evident. A man is more likely to cover his humiliation under a mask of defiance, while the sight of his naked body (whether from Heroic Build or... other endowments ) may cause his male guards to feel ashamed and inadequate. When a male is Shamefully Stripped, this is often a sign that the villain is a sexually voracious woman. Alternatively, the villain may be a Depraved Bisexual , Depraved Homosexual , or Psycho Lesbian victimizing a same-sex captive. Sub-Trope of Naked Vulnerability . Related to Undressing the Unconscious (a character has their clothes removed while they were in an unconscious state). Fanservice for some people, and sometimes specifically meant to be this by the creator — although some instances of this are so cruel that even the easily titillated are likely to be turned off . A benefactor who comes upon such a situation may offer a Chivalrous Shirt . Contrast Go-Go Enslavement , in which the torture is that someone loses the right to choose her own clothing and must wear the outfit their captors provide — clothes which are scandalously revealing or utterly humiliating in some other way. Occasionally a prelude to Bathe Her and Bring Her to Me . Accidental happenstances go into Wardrobe Malfunction or Stripping Snag . If a character loses their hair instead of their clothes, it's Traumatic Haircut . Insignia Rip-Off Ritual is when the subject's medallions or badges of rank are torn off. See also Pervy Patdown for cases where a strip search is performed (or just invoked as an excuse). The opposite is Defiant Strip . As with all Sexual Harassment and Rape Tropes , No Real Life Examples, Please!
